title: Trichantha lehmannii
taxonomy: Trichantha lehmannii is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is a member of the genus Trichantha, which is a group of plants commonly known as mint family plants. The family Lamiaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants that also includes basil, rosemary, and oregano. Trichantha lehmannii is classified as a plant species within the kingdom Plantae. It is further classified as a member of the phylum Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, and order Lamiales.
